label: List
summary: A <ul> with themed pixel markers in place of the stock disc.
era: GeoCities' jeweled bullets, spinning balls, gems and tiny arrows doing the stock <li> disc's job with style.

classes.name: rs-list
classes.role: the themed <ul>; nested levels alternate glyphs

a11y: Markers are decoration on an honest <ul>: item counts and list semantics reach screen readers untouched.
